selectedTaskBefore.title: Exercise a real CLI iteration against a temp workspace and tighten any artifact or verifier gaps it exposes
selectedTaskBefore.notes: The integration suite mocks `codex exec`; a controlled real-run smoke should harden the end-to-end evidence path.

selectedTaskAfter.title: Exercise a real CLI iteration against a temp workspace and tighten any artifact or verifier gaps it exposes
selectedTaskAfter.notes: Added an optional `npm run test:real-cli-smoke` temp-workspace runner that drives the actual `codex exec` path, documented its operator use and environment limits, and surfaced summarized execution failure messages into the structured iteration/latest-result/status artifacts. A real smoke run in this sandbox exercised the path and preserved a temp workspace with the expected backend-connect failure evidence.
